message:
fix(threadStatus): ignore critiques before first COMPILED message

Before this fix, the thread status calculation would count CRITIQUE
messages even in the initial round (before any COMPILED synthesis existed).
This was incorrect because you cannot meaningfully critique work that
hasn't been compiled yet.

Changes:
- Add `allowCritiques` flag that's only true when latestCompiled exists
- Update `critiquesInCurrentRound` counting to respect this flag
- Update `getMessagesInCurrentRound()` to filter out critiques in pre-COMPILED state
- Add test case with "premature critique" to verify the fix

The fix ensures that:
1. Before first COMPILED: only DELTAs count toward current round
2. After first COMPILED: both DELTAs and CRITIQUEs count

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
